title: jatropha purpurea
intro: Jatropha purpurea, also known as the purple jatropha, is a plant species from the Euphorbiaceae family, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing swelling and pain, as well as promoting wound healing and skin regeneration. The herbal preparations of Jatropha purpurea include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
